edits.description: PR-mined: modeled after the real merged StreetComplete PR #6318 'util: handle duplicate elements in Collection.containsExactlyInAnyOrder()' (2025-08-13), which fixed containsExactlyInAnyOrder to use a count-map instead of a naive containsAll check. That fix is already baked into our pinned commit (26c673030a09..., tag v63.2), so a literal forward-patch of the PR's own diff is a no-op against this baseline. This edit reuses the same count-map idiom for a new, related helper: mostCommonOrNull().

assertions.name: behavioral_marker
assertions.detail: marker 'quick build reloaded Collections.mostCommonOrNull' found in recompiled class bytes

edits.description: PR-mined: modeled after the real merged StreetComplete PR #6311 'fix: correct Vector3d division and subtraction operations' (2025-06-06), which fixed copy-paste bugs in Vector3d's div()/minus() operators (they referenced the wrong component). That fix is already baked into our pinned commit (div/minus already use x/y/z correctly), so a literal forward-patch of the PR's own diff is a no-op against this baseline. This edit continues the same 'make Vector3d's per-component operators complete' spirit by adding destructuring component1/2/3() operators.

assertions.name: behavioral_marker
assertions.detail: marker "quick build reloaded Vector3d's destructuring operators" found in recompiled class bytes

edits.description: PR-mined: modeled after the real merged StreetComplete PR #6307 'Fix angle normalization with non-zero startAt parameter' (2025-06-06), which fixed the normalizeDegrees/normalizeRadians formulas and their docs. That fix is already baked into our pinned commit, so a literal forward-patch of the PR's own diff is a no-op against this baseline. This edit continues the same file's real overload asymmetry: normalizeDegrees has both Double and Float overloads, but normalizeRadians only had Double -- this adds the missing Float overload.

assertions.name: behavioral_marker
assertions.detail: marker 'quick build reloaded AngleMath.normalizeRadians(Float)' found in recompiled class bytes
